summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. This shard is not a dedupe cluster, has no canonical, and merge/fix/raise_pr/low-signal closeout are disabled. Deterministic validation flags #80251, #80646, #82734, #81176, #82894, and #82895 as security-sensitive, so those exact PRs are quarantined with route_security. The remaining non-security PRs are kept as independent maintainer-review items, except #82754 which remains needs_human because it is a maintainer-owned draft marked waiting on author.
